item.title: What could the Eagles get back in an A.J. Brown trade? We crafted four offers
item.description: Brown could get traded this offseason. Could Buffalo be a good fit? Baltimore? Let's project his market with four offers and a verdict.

item.title: Live updates: USA extends lead over Slovakia on Thompson's power-play goal
MacKinnon sends Canada to gold medal game
item.description: Nathan MacKinnon scored the go-ahead goal with 35.2 seconds left after Shea Theodore tied it midway through the third period, and Canada survived anot...

item.title: Sellier goes to hospital after blade hits over eye
item.description: Kamila Sellier of Poland was stretchered off after a blade sliced over her left eye during an accident at the women's 1500 meters Friday, but Polish o...

item.title: Chiefs' Reid offers positive update on Kelce talks
item.description: Chiefs coach Andy Reid was all smiles while discussing the future of tight end Travis Kelce, who is considering another season in Kansas City or retir...
